steps.assistant_text: -O0 frame-pack cap cracked: -O0 slot map is top-down in DECLARATION order and each register var reserves a 4-byte home slot even when colored to an s-reg. Interleaving scalar decls between aggregates (q, raw, p1, p2, tmp, src, pad_lo[2]) shifts raw->0x48 tmp->0x34 frame-neutrally; s-reg assignment follows register-decl order only so it survives the reorder.
